arts.ttl: Gallery: Palace prepare to host Brentford in SE25
arts.sum: The London derbies are coming thick and fast for Crystal Palace in early 2025, with their third already this calendar year coming on Sunday against Brentford at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace table €12m offer for midfielder – €15m will get deal done for interest clubs
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Crystal Palace have stepped up in their pursuit for Trabzonspor midfielder Batista Mendy, but face competition from Rennes. The 24-year-old was a reported target for the Eagles during the last summer window and he’s continued to be linked with a move to Selhurst Park.
